name: conf-client-electron
description: Electron client for the conference application

scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p ./dist && shopt -s nullglob && cp ./src/*.json ./dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp ./src/*.html ./dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../../node_modules/simple-keyboard/build/css/index.css ./dist/simple-keyboard.css 2>/dev/null || true
